parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest difference is dependency order: one version lets examples develop claims and transitions, while the other reverses those links, turning controlled sentences into an unusable sequence.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A builds its argument through recognizable domestic scenes, sensory provocations, and linked analogies; the late promotional stretch repeats its assurances, but headings and examples maintain a mostly intelligible progression.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B retains vivid details at sentence level, yet presents them in reversed, severed order: conclusions precede premises, headings trail their material, references lose antecedents, and the chapter terminates in an incomplete contents line.
